supply_chain.dependencies: Dependence on availability of materials including steel, copper, aluminum, power transformers, circuit breakers, solar panels, wind turbine blades
supply_chain.risks: Supply chain and logistical challenges, sourcing restrictions on materials (e.g., solar panels), delays in availability of power transformers, tariffs and duties impacting material costs and availability

regulatory_risks: Licensing, permitting and inspection requirements applicable to contractors and engineers
Worker safety regulations (OSHA)
Environmental protection regulations
Wage and hour regulations (Fair Labor Standards Act)
Regulations relating to sourcing and transportation of equipment and materials
Regulations regarding engagement of suppliers and subcontractors meeting diversity-ownership requirements
Building and electrical codes
U.S. and non-U.S. anti-corruption regulations (FCPA)
Immigration regulations applicable to U.S. and cross-border employment
Special bidding, procurement, cybersecurity and security clearance requirements on government projects
Federal Acquisition Regulations (FAR), Defense Federal Acquisition Regulation Supplement (DFARS)
Cyber Security Material Model Certificate (CMMC) requirements for DoD contracts
Environmental laws governing handling, transportation and disposal of hazardous substances
Regulatory and permitting delays impacting large transmission and pipeline projects
Tariffs, duties, taxes, assessments on materials or components
SEC climate disclosure rules
State climate disclosure requirements (California)
Multiemployer pension plan regulations under Employee Retirement Income Security Act and Pension Protection Act
Hart-Scott Rodino Act antitrust requirements for acquisitions
FTC rules prohibiting post-employment non-compete arrangements

sanction_risks: Changes in U.S. and global trade relationships impacting material sourcing
Tariffs and trade restrictions affecting equipment and materials availability
